title: AlinMods
description: AlinMods is a multiplayer-focused modpack designed to enhance the game's visuals and performance in online play.
body:
## Welcome to AlinMods!

Alinmods, originally known as AlinPack, is a multiplayer-focused modpack designed to enhance the game's visuals and performance in online play. Unlike single-player optimization packs, this collection is tailored specifically for a better multiplayer experience.  

[![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net)  

### Why Multiplayer?  
> The pack optimizes the game's visual performance, which is most noticeable in multiplayer. Single-player benefits slightly as well.  

<details>  
<summary>Included Mods</summary>  
Continuity, Yet Another Config Lib, Puzzle, Polytone, Fabrishot, Entity Model Features, More Culling, Immediately Fast, SailStatus, AlinPerspective, Capes, More Chat History, Cloth Config, Sodium, Entity Texture Features, Reese's Sodium Options, Paxi, CWB, Sodium Options API, Fabric Language Kotlin, FSB Interop, Entity Sound Features, OptiGUI, Noisium, Dynamic FPS, Sodium Leaf Culling, Entity Culling, Enhanced Block Entities, Fabric API, Animatica, Sodium Extra, Model Fix, Debugify, AlinLib, Yung's API, YOSBR, Fabric Skyboxes, Iris, Sodium Options Mod Compat, RRLS, Cam Overlay, Bad Optimizations, Lithium, Better Mount HUD, Action Bar Info, BetterGrassify, Mod Menu, ModernFix, CIT Resewn, Paginated Advancements, E4MC Minecraft, Main Menu Credits, No Chat Reports, MixinTrace, Fix Keyboard on Linux, Language Reload, FerriteCore, TXNILib, ThreadTweak, Zoomify, Water Player, FastQuit, macOS Input Fixes, LambDynamicLights.
</details>  

### Performance Comparison  

<details>  
<summary>Test System</summary>  

  **CPU**: AMD Ryzen 5 7500F  
  **GPU**: AMD Radeon RX 6750 XT (12GB)  
  **Monitor**: 2560x1440  
  **Memory**: 8GB / 32GB DDR5 (XMP Profile 6000MHz)  

</details>  

#### Vanilla  
> ~1000 FPS  

![Vanilla](https://wf.kelcu.ru/mods/alinpack/vanilla-v2.png)  

#### AlinPack  
> ~1400 FPS (1.4x boost)  

![AlinPack](https://wf.kelcu.ru/mods/alinpack/alinpack-v2.png)
